requirement: [Memory Allocation] Handle concurrent allocation requests from up to 64 processes without deadlocks or race conditions

test_cases.description: Validate the system's ability to handle concurrent memory allocation requests from up to 64 processes
preconditions: There are 64 processes ready to make memory allocation requests
steps: Simultaneously trigger memory allocation requests from all 64 processes
Monitor system behavior for any deadlocks or race conditions
test_cases.expected_result: All 64 memory allocation requests should be successfully handled without deadlocks or race conditions

test_cases.description: Verify the system's behavior when handling a memory allocation request from a single process
preconditions: There is one process ready to make a memory allocation request
steps: Trigger a memory allocation request from the single process
Monitor system response time and resource utilization
test_cases.expected_result: The memory allocation request should be successfully processed without any issues

test_cases.description: Examine system behavior when handling the 65th memory allocation request
preconditions: There are already 64 active memory allocation requests
steps: Monitor system response and resource allocation
test_cases.expected_result: The system should gracefully handle the additional memory allocation request without deadlocks or race conditions

test_cases.description: Evaluate system performance under the load of 64 concurrent memory allocation requests
preconditions: There are 64 processes ready to make memory allocation requests
steps: Simultaneously trigger memory allocation requests from all 64 processes
Measure system response time and resource consumption
test_cases.expected_result: The system should efficiently handle all 64 concurrent memory allocation requests within acceptable performance thresholds

test_cases.description: Integrate memory allocation handling with a process manager to ensure seamless coordination
preconditions: Process manager is active and managing the 64 processes
steps: Initiate memory allocation requests through the process manager
Verify coordination between memory allocation handling and process management
test_cases.expected_result: Memory allocation requests should be successfully coordinated and processed without conflicts
